parameters.query:
INSERT INTO public.seguimientos_syh (lead_id, phone, toque, programado_para, estado, template_usado)
SELECT l.id, l.phone, 1, now(), 'pendiente', 'audio_ogg'
FROM public.leads l
JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT message->>'type' AS msg_role
  FROM public.chat_histories
  WHERE session_id = l.phone
  ORDER BY id DESC
  LIMIT 1
) lm ON true
WHERE l.phone_from IS NULL
  AND l.phone IS NOT NULL
  AND lm.msg_role = 'ai'
  AND l.estado NOT IN ('llamada','visita')
  AND l.timestamp_mensaje >= date_trunc('day', now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Argentina/Buenos_Aires' - INTERVAL '1 day') AT TIME ZONE 'America/Argentina/Buenos_Aires'
  AND l.timestamp_mensaje <  date_trunc('day', now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Argentina/Buenos_Aires') AT TIME ZONE 'America/Argentina/Buenos_Aires'
  AND l.timestamp_mensaje >= now() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
ON CONFLICT (lead_id, toque) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id, lead_id, phone;
